programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Thelma's indecision turns to agony when Harry accepts a new job and moves to California.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: The Evanses put together a rent party to raise money for the project's favorite senior citizen.

programme.title: Downsized
programme.desc: A man downsizes his family's lifestyle to keep the members of it from growing apart.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Bow's mom visits the family for the first time since the loss of Bow's dad; Bow decides to throw a big party for what would have been her dad's next birthday; Mason invites Diane to an MMA fight on the same night as the party.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: The twins opt out of the family Halloween costume for fear it will hurt their social status in school; Dre and Bow try to help by putting together a haunted house and inviting the whole seventh grade; Junior spends time with a girl from Ruby's choir.

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Bridget had a pregnancy scare; Latrell takes advantage of Imunique and Fabian.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Latrell and Imunique find a lot of money; Delroy has been kidnapped.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Adonis elicits jealousy from Fabian when his boyfriend recruits him for a dance competition; it appears that she is placing him in the closet again.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: Friends of a young woman (Eve) provide perspectives on male/female relationships; Shelly finds herself drawn to J.T. (Jason George) during a night out with her friends.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: Janie gives Shelly relationship advice after spying a box of condoms in J.T.'s shopping cart.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: Shelly resorts to snooping through J.T.'s stuff to get to know him better; Donovan sends Nick to the best tattoo artist (DMX) in Miami.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: J.T. and Shelly talk about dating exclusively after a party stirs up jealousy. Carmen Electra, Corey Reynolds and Julio Iglesias Jr. guest star.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: After J.T. quits, Shelly continues salsa lessons with a handsome instructor (Cris Judd); Rita moves into a studio apartment.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: J.T. calls Shelly's bluff and agrees to let her pay for dinner; Nick duplicates Donovan's stylish wardrobe.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: J.T. cancels a romantic getaway with Shelly in order to play in a basketball tournament with his friends.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: J.T. feels as though his privacy has been invaded when Shelly shares an intimate detail about their sex life with her friends.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: Shelly struggles to win the respect of J.T.'s disapproving mother (Daphne Maxwell Reid) after she walks in on J.T. and Shelly in bed together.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: J.T.'s ex-girlfriend rouses Shelly's competitive spirit; Donovan trains his boss' incompetent son to be a manager at Z Lounge.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: J.T. gets fed up with the long hours Shelly is working during the holidays; Donovan's ex-girlfriend visits.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: J.T. is put in the middle when Nick tells Shelly she has overstayed her welcome at the townhouse.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Things the roommates confided to Regine surface in a comic's act.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.sub-title: She Ain't Heavy, She's My Mother
programme.desc: When Khadijah's mother visits on Mother's Day, she brings her friend Laverne, Regine's estranged mother.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Khadijah must choose between Alonzo and her old flame, Terrence, who announces he wants her back.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.sub-title: There's Got to Be a Morning After
programme.desc: Maxine and Kyle spend the night together after drowning their sorrows in a bottle of tequila.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max and Regine decide to decrease their dependence on men by taking a motivational seminar; Overton sends gifts to Synclaire.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Putting her basketball MVP title on the line, Khadijah plays a grudge match against her high-school rival.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max gets her old job back, then quits; Overton and Regine think a neighbor is a serial killer.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: When Regine takes over creation of an ad in Flavor, Khadijah's magazine, tension rises between the roommates.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Synclaire decides to drop out of her night-school art history class after Overton enrolls in the course to spend more time with her.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Overton's younger sister comes for a visit and ends up falling for Kyle; Regine decides to become a vegetarian.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Kyle, Overton and Synclaire try to scare Max at Scooter's Halloween party.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.sub-title: Abstinence Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Synclaire and Overton mull intimacy; Khadijah has a bad-luck streak.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max gets a new job selling subliminal tapes for a telemarketing company.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Regine has trouble facing herself when she's advised to have breast reduction surgery to rest her overburdened back.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Things become tense during Thanksgiving dinner when Max's, Kyle's and Regine's dates clash with everyone else.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Kyle has to decide whether or not to cut his dreadlocks after he's told the style doesn't fit the corporate image.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Jealousy flies when an old friend of Khadijah's gets a job at Flavor and starts hanging out with Synclaire.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Kyle's singing performance at a local talent contest is disrupted by Maxine's presence; Regine coaches Khadijah.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: The Flavor Unit staff decides to strike after becoming fed up with malfunctioning office equipment.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Synclaire is sent reeling after an attractive classmate, Jon Marc, kisses her during a discussion about Freud.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Regine and Overton get stuck in a van during a blizzard, while the gang is snowed in at home.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Regine and Darryl second-guess their relationship after she fails to hit it off with his friends.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Things heat up for Maxine when she finds out her new boss is her former boyfriend.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Kyle becomes annoyed with Overton and Synclaire's relationship; Maxine tries to recover a compromising tape of herself.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: The R&B group 702 shoots to stardom in the mid 1990s with top-10 hits and platinum album success; the members recall how personnel changes and jealousies led to the group's disbanding in 2003.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Ken is a professional performer with a busy lifestyle. His roommates recently moved out and left him with a two bedroom apartment in need of a major redesign.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Titus and Ami are a busy couple who are always on the go and they have two active children who love to play. The couple says their two bedroom apartment feels more like a storage unit than a home, due to the clutter and lack of space. They need Jake.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Dominique is a barber who lives in Long Beach, but she has an elite clientele in Hollywood. Her love for clothes and lack of space, forced her to turn her bedroom into a closet! Now the clothing clutter has her wondering how she can reclaim her spac.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Lisa and Tyler are high school sweethearts who recently got engaged. They have said goodbye to their respective roommates and moved into their first apartment together. Now, they are living out of boxes and say they need a revamped living-dining roo.

programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.sub-title: Get the Hell Out Before I Delout
programme.desc: Delroy's wildly-successful former-protégé buys out Del Jones Realty; a game night with the gang at the condo goes terribly wrong and turns everyone against each other.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Jasmine gets serious with Terrence but discovers that he's a wanted drug dealer.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.sub-title: You Don't Have to Go Home, But..
programme.desc: Latrell returns a favor to Armando; Bridget finds a ring in Delroy's office and assumes he's planning on proposing.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: The children and Willona try to convince Florida to have some fun.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: J.J. becomes an instant celebrity after winning a local art show.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: When Cliff and Clair are away, Theo's small gathering erupts into a wild party.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff tries to coax the grandfather (Sammy Davis Jr.) of an unwed mother-to-be into providing moral support for the girl.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff and Clair let Rudy stay up as late as she wants when she complains about all the house rules.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.sub-title: The Dead End Kids Meet Dr. Lotus
programme.desc: Theo's troubles with Justine (Michelle Thomas) inspire him to visit a voodoo doctor (Moses Gunn).

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max finds her purpose in life through hypnosis; Khadijah's ex-boyfriend professes his love.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Synclaire gets even with a lying Marco with the aid of his ex-wife; Max is pregnant.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max finds out that Kyle is the father of her baby; Synclaire gets her own TV series.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: The housemates must find a diplomatic way to tell Regine her new boyfriend is married.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A community is rocked when a mother, her children, and their neighbor are brutally murdered; as detectives try to uncover who would commit a quadruple homicide, their investigation leads to an undeniable clue.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Police find a nurse and mother bludgeoned to death in her home, and evidence suggests that someone she knew is the killer; when police learn about her involvement with multiple men, they consider an act of jealousy likely.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: The murder of a new mother shocks a quiet community, especially when investigators learn that her estranged U.S. Army sergeant husband has an alibi; investigators find evidence of a love triangle involving a woman who is willing to cross the line.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Police are stunned when two young men are gunned down in their backyard; investigators find a heartbroken lover and a web of lies concealing the truth.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: In Lubbock, Texas, detectives respond to an early-morning robbery-turned-homicide; they're not sure where to start looking for the killer, then a surveillance video and an anonymous tip lead them to a secret.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Col. Taylor (Glynn Turman) is roasted at the campus military dinner; Dwayne issues a challenge to Whitley.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Spring break begins badly when Dwayne and Ron pick up the wrong luggage.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Spring break is further complicated for Dwayne and Ron by drug dealers who are pursuing them.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Whitley finds comfort with Dwayne at his place -- until she mistakes his mother (Patti LaBelle) for the maid.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: When Cliff and Clair are away, Theo's small gathering erupts into a wild party.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.sub-title: The Dead End Kids Meet Dr. Lotus
programme.desc: Theo's troubles with Justine (Michelle Thomas) inspire him to visit a voodoo doctor (Moses Gunn).

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a mother of five is found murdered in her home, detectives catch a break in the case when a key witness comes forward; putting the killer behind bars proves to be much more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A hopeful New Year's Eve turns into a tragedy when a man is found shot inside his home; is this just a devastating accident involving a neighborhood celebration?; is it possible this man was the target of a calculated attack?

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: An ambitious single mother with a bright future finds love in a man with a troubled past. When he is linked to murder, she stands by him. And as evidence mounts, loyalty turns to liability as she faces a harsh truth: love could cost her everything.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: When a 26 year old woman falls for a handsome 28 year old, she believes she's found a man who will truly love and protect her; but when his protection comes with dire consequences, she'll have to weigh the cost of his security versus her own freedom.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A hopeful New Year's Eve turns into a tragedy when a man is found shot inside his home; is this just a devastating accident involving a neighborhood celebration?; is it possible this man was the target of a calculated attack?
